captures.chat_api_url: Not surfaced by extension HTTP network reader. character.ai streams chat via WebSocket to neo.character.ai (wss://neo.character.ai/ws/) — WS frames are not captured by read_network_requests (HTTP XHR/fetch only). Only telemetry POSTs observed (prodregistryv2.org/v1/rgstr, adtrafficquality.google).
captures.chat_api_path: /ws/ (WebSocket on neo.character.ai) — not byte-confirmed this session; needs CDP/HAR (WS frames)
captures.request_content_type: WebSocket text frame (JSON command envelope) — inferred
captures.response_content_type: WebSocket text frames (JSON turn/candidate deltas) — inferred
captures.success_response_wire_sample: Body not captured (WS not in extension HTTP log + taint-guard). Answer streamed token-by-token into the message bubble (roleplay text). Raw WS frame schema requires CDP/HAR.
captures.frame_separator: WebSocket frame boundaries (each delta = one WS text frame) — not byte-confirmed
captures.dom_render_structure: Next.js. Answer text chain: EM > P > div.prose.dark:prose-invert > div.font-display.font-light > div.mt-1.max-w-xl > div.flex.flex-col > div.m-0.flex. Markdown via 'prose' (Tailwind typography); narration rendered as <em> italics. Message bubble per turn with regenerate/like/dislike toolbar.

notes: Logged in as HealthyWorm4019. Character-chat platform (not single chatbot) — opened 'Dr Bright' character to chat. Benign prompt SUCCEEDED: Dr Bright replied in-character (roleplay greeting/narration). Chat transport is WebSocket (neo.character.ai) which Claude-in-Chrome's HTTP network reader does NOT surface — only telemetry endpoints captured. etap-bypassed clean baseline. Raw WS frame schema needs CDP/HAR fallback.
